identity.name: Pratik S Reddy
identity.headline: Builder of local-first AI, automation, evidence, and agentic operating systems.

privacy.summary: This feed publishes redacted metadata, public-safe project summaries, source freshness, and suite boundaries only.

statusStrip.label: Alive adapter brick
statusStrip.detail: Generated public metadata feed from allowlisted local evidence.

statusStrip.label: Switchboard metadata
statusStrip.detail: Foundation projection is metadata-only and git-safe.

statusStrip.label: Palimpsest sources
statusStrip.detail: Source-state menu is used as a public boundary map, not as raw memory export.

statusStrip.label: Private records
statusStrip.detail: Sensitive source classes are blocked before UI rendering.

statusStrip.label: Vercel deploy
statusStrip.detail: GitHub import and custom domain binding happen after repo push.

suiteLanes.name: Agent Ops
suiteLanes.role: Manager memory and prompt control plane
suiteLanes.publicSummary: Records CEO instructions, gates, agent handoffs, and implementation boundaries before work reaches builders.
suiteLanes.source: manager-private record summarized for public site
suiteLanes.privacyBoundary: Exact private wording stays in the manager layer.

suiteLanes.name: Switchboard
suiteLanes.role: Dev-side evidence and source-state control plane
suiteLanes.publicSummary: Tracks project shape, task-ledger activity, git safety, source freshness, and release evidence without publishing private payloads.

suiteLanes.name: Palimpsest
suiteLanes.publicSummary: Normalizes sources into privacy-labeled evidence lanes with confidence, lineage, and freshness boundaries.
suiteLanes.privacyBoundary: Memory records remain local unless a future public-safe contract allows more.

suiteLanes.name: Sys Docs
suiteLanes.publicSummary: Keeps local system maps, project docs, service facts, and confidence labels aligned with the rest of the suite.
suiteLanes.privacyBoundary: Host details and local paths are not exported.

suiteLanes.name: Meeting Extractor
suiteLanes.publicSummary: Turns local meeting recordings into structured artifacts for private review and later redacted summaries.
suiteLanes.privacyBoundary: Meeting media, spoken content, and visual artifacts stay private.

suiteLanes.name: X Archive
suiteLanes.publicSummary: Maintains source freshness and record counts for local X archive work while omitting post and reply bodies.
suiteLanes.privacyBoundary: Post and reply bodies stay out of the public feed.

suiteLanes.name: Union Bank Finance
suiteLanes.publicSummary: Represents the finance dashboard as a high-level project lane only, suitable for synthetic public examples later.
suiteLanes.source: Palimpsest source-state menu and public project seed
suiteLanes.privacyBoundary: Only synthetic or aggregate public examples are allowed.

projects.title: Switchboard Dashboard
projects.stack: Python, FastAPI, local inventory, workflow ledger
projects.summary: Control-center and node-workflow dashboard for local projects, snapshots, tasks, and source-state evidence.

projects.title: YouTube Downloader
projects.summary: Media automation project represented with public repository evidence only.
